name: Raspberry-Fig Breakfast Bar Recipe (and Fig Puree')
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups California dried figs, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. FIG PUREE: Combine the figs, water, and honey in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 20 minutes or until softened.
3. Using the knife blade in the food processor bowl, add the fig mixture. Process for 10 seconds until smooth.
4. Preheat the oven to 250°F (125°C).
5. Mix all ingredients except jam. Form into crumbs.
6. Press half of the mixture into a pan sprayed with PAM.
7. Spread the jam on the crumb crust.
8. Form the top layer with the remaining mixture.
9. Bake for 50-60 minutes.
